Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const h=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const m=h.match\(/<script\(?:\\s[^>]*\)?>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\)||[]; for \(const block of m\) { const body=block.replace\(/^<script[^>]*>/,''\).replace\(/<\\/script>\\$/,''\); if \(body.trim\(\)===''\) continue; try { new Function\(body\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('SYNTAX ERROR:', e.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\); } } console.log\('scripts inspected:', m.length\);")
Bash(awk 'match\($0, /^const [A-Z][A-Za-z_0-9]*\\s*=/\) { print NR": "substr\($0, RSTART, RLENGTH\) }' index.html)
Bash(perl -ne 'for my $n \(qw\(SCHED_DATA SESSION_DATES DAY_TO_RRULE DAY_TO_JS ROOM_DATA DAY_LABELS MODULE_DEFS\)\) { if \(/\\b\\Q$n\\E\\b/\) { print "$n\\t$.\\t$_"; last } }' index.html)
Bash(awk '/<\\/script>/{ close_line=NR } END { print close_line }' index.html)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const line=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\).split\('\\n'\)[3237]; const json=line.replace\(/^const SCHED_DATA = /,''\).replace\(/;$/,''\); const d=JSON.parse\(json\); console.log\('cores[0]:', JSON.stringify\(d.cores[0],null,2\)\); console.log\('conflicts keys:', Object.keys\(d.conflicts[0]\).slice\(0,3\)\); console.log\('sections[LinAlg]:', JSON.stringify\(d.sections.LinAlg,null,2\)\);")
Bash(awk '/^GERM-UA 111 / {print NR": "$0; for \(i=1; i<=5; i++\) { getline l; print \(NR+i\)": "l }}' src/ingester/fixtures/germ-ua.txt)
